title: SONY UBPX700KB.CEK Smart 4K Ultra HD Blu-ray & DVD Player

keySpecs.label: Plays Blu-ray discs / DVDs with upscaling
Supports Dolby Atmos / DTS:X / High-Resolution Audio

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S1HDM115 High Speed HDMI Cable with Ethernet - 1 m

description.main: This Sony Blu-ray player lets you enjoy your favourite movies in stunning 4K Ultra HD quality. That's four times the resolution of Full HD, so everything looks incredible. Enjoy cinema-like visuals with HDR10 and Dolby Vision. They bring out the best in highlights, darks and colours so you'll see more detail in every frame. And immerse yourself in high-resolution audio – it gives you three times more data than CDs for superior sound quality.
goodToKnow: Connect your AV equipment easily with HDMI and Coaxial SPDIF
The user-friendly interface keeps all your apps organised and quick to access
Give those golden oldie movies a new lease of life with 4K upscaling
